rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO TERMINATE CONSERVATORSHIP OF PERSON AND ESTATE

Notice Of Motion, Points And Authorities And Decl. Of Robin Rudderow In Support Of Franklin Niemi'S Mo. To: Deem Admitted Meadowlark Real Estate Llc'S Responses To Franklin Niemi'S Request For Admissions; Compel Meadowlark Real Estate Llc To Respond To Franklin Niemi'S Interrogatories; And Sanction Meadowlark
rulings.Rulings: Matter calendared for Thursday, March 21, 2007. Conservator's Motion To Deem Admitted Conservator's Requests For Admissions To Defendant Meadowlark Real Estate LLC; To Compel Defendant Meadowlark Real Estate LLC To Respond To Conservator's Interrogatories is moot as responses have been served. The late responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant Meadowlark Real Estate LLC in the amount of $895, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. = (612/EAH)
